metadata.title: Ultrametric Tree — Practical p-Adic Information Retrieval on Cloudflare Workers
metadata.description: Production implementation of ultrametric distance, p-adic valuation, Ostrowski's theorem, and Hensel's lemma applied to a real-world research paper discovery engine. The system uses agglomerative single-linkage clustering to organize 451 academic paper titles into an ultrametric dendrogram with a three-phase search engine (word-match → cluster expansion → tree pruned search). Deployed on Cloudflare Workers, R2, and Pages. Includes 20 documented mathematical principles with production Cloudflare applications.
